name: The Club Lemont
about: The Club Lemont is an indoor golf simulator venue and cocktail bar. It offers a social environment for golf practice, dining, and league play. The venue features simulator bays available for hourly rental and various membership tiers. Food and beverages are served in-house with a focus on local craft beers and cocktails. It is designed for both casual golfers and those looking to join structured leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines golf simulation with a full-service cocktail bar for a complete entertainment experience
Offers structured leagues with handicapped scoring and cash prizes for competitive play
Multiple membership options available for regulars, including off-peak peak hours and unlimited access
Allows walk-ins and online booking for flexible scheduling

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a full menu
12 local craft beer selections on draft and a full cocktail program

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed as The Club Lemont has a full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and your pace of play, but it typically takes between 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is primarily an adult-focused sports bar and cocktail establishment, making it not ideal for children.
